name: Product Testimonial
description: Classic 3-scene UGC testimonial: relatable hook, product showcase with benefits, strong CTA. Optimized for TikTok/Reels retention.

guidelines.goal: Stop the scroll. Establish relatability within 1.5 seconds.
guidelines.voiceover: Start with 'POV:', 'Stop scrolling if...', or a relatable frustration. Keep it under 15 words.
guidelines.visuals: Talking-head overlay or POV camera angle. Bold center-screen text (2-3 words per line). Snap-cut or whip-pan transition.
guidelines.music: Start at low volume (0.10-0.15), trending lo-fi or upbeat instrumental.

guidelines.goal: Showcase the product naturally. Hit 2-3 key benefits. Maintain conversational tone.
guidelines.voiceover: Describe personal experience with the product. Use specific details (e.g., 'set it up in 10 minutes'). Avoid corporate jargon.
guidelines.visuals: Product screenshots or screen recording. Animated bullet points for key features. Brand colors for accents.
guidelines.music: Maintain low volume (0.10-0.12). Consider a subtle beat drop at the main benefit reveal.

guidelines.goal: Drive action. Create urgency without being pushy. End with a question to boost comments.
guidelines.voiceover: Restate the core value prop in one sentence. Direct CTA ('link in bio', 'try it free'). Optional: end with a question.
guidelines.visuals: Brand gradient background. Large CTA text. Brand logo visible. Music fades out in last 2 seconds.
guidelines.music: Slight volume increase (0.18-0.22). Fade out over final 2 seconds.

tips: Hook must grab attention in the first 1.5 seconds - front-load the relatable moment
Use snap-cuts every 3-4 seconds to maintain retention through the content scene
Bullet points should appear one-by-one, synced with the voiceover mentions
CTA should feel like a friend's recommendation, not an ad
Background music should never compete with the voiceover - keep it subtle
